narrative:
Beavercreek 001 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,412 registered voters, with 64.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
